uplink.description: Status report: 3.6 V battery, 25.38 C, 68.00 % RH
uplink._note: Input is the upstream ttn example status report; expected.data authored here and cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6 -> battery, Temp 25.38 -> air.temperature, Humi 68 -> air.relativeHumidity).

uplink.description: Low-battery flag: byte3 high bit set (3.6 V), 3.00 C, 55.00 % RH
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte3 = 0x80 | 36). Upstream reports Volt '3.6(low battery)'; we normalize to battery 3.6 + extra lowBattery true. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temp 3.00, Humi 55.00).

uplink.description: Negative temperature: 3.2 V battery, -5.50 C, 2.00 % RH
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising two's-complement negative temperature (bytes[4..5] = 0xFDDA = -550 -> -5.50 C). Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Full-scale humidity: 12.2 V battery (low), 31.00 C, 100.00 % RH
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input at humidity upper bound (bytes[6..7] = 0x2710 = 10000 -> 100.00 %). byte3 = 0x80 | 122 -> 12.2 V + lowBattery. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js.
Input is the upstream ttn example startup version report (reportType byte2 == 0x00). Upstream returns device metadata (Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode); we carry no measurement here and report an error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Input is the upstream ttn example ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7. Config frames carry no measurement; reported as an unsupported fPort error.
